generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures the hoist's swinging motion in the lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors wind speed in the lab-scale gantry crane environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance RaspberryPiSensorArray : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi with unspecified sensor types for real-time air quality data collection in the Air Quality Management exemplar"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiSensorArray
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Continuously captures and forwards the crane's state data (position, velocity, force) via Python interface"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensorInterface
]

instance CraneStateSensorInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program interfacing with the crane's controllers to capture real-time operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360-based 3D CAD model representing geometric and kinematic constraints of the lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaDashboardEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based structured representation of the Air Quality Management system components and behaviors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MicrosoftAzurePipelineEnabler
]

instance PrerecordedGreenhouseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Embedded prerecorded data in virtual machine images for offline simulation and analysis in GreenhouseDT"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VirtualMachineEnabler
]

instance CraneTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "High-frequency time-series data of crane telemetry (sensor readings, actuator commands) stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaDashboardEnabler
]

instance AirQualityTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time air quality data collected from Raspberry Pi sensor array and stored in InfluxDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler, MicrosoftAzurePipelineEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL extension) for high-frequency data logging of crane telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for real-time and historical visualization of crane states, trajectories, and system health"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto (MQTT broker) for low-latency bidirectional communication between physical crane and DT services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ArduinoControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino-based hardware for real-time sensor actuation and data acquisition, bridging physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance PythonC4ModuleEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python with C4 Containers bundled into reusable module for DT service orchestration and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance InfluxDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB for time-series data storage in Air Quality Management exemplar"
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualitySimulationService
]

instance MicrosoftAzurePipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline implementation in Air Quality Management exemplar"
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualitySimulationService, AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance VirtualMachineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtual machines with prerecorded data for offline simulation in GreenhouseDT"
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService
]

// C6: Services
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Leverages kinematic model to compute and enforce optimal movement trajectories (energy efficiency, throughput maximization)"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, ActuateCraneAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB-backed system for time-series data storage enabling retrospective analysis of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOperationMetricsInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard integrated with HMI showing real-time and historical crane states, sensor traces, and system telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bidirectional synchronization validating digital twin's kinematic model against real-time sensor data for model fidelity"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelFidelityInsight, AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance AirQualitySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization and simulation of indoor air quality using AutomationML-based models"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityVisualizationInsight
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for indoor air quality based on real-time sensor data and historical patterns"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityForecastInsight
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Self-adaptive behavioral modeling of greenhouse and its digital twin using prerecorded data"
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseAdaptationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed optimal movement trajectories with quantified energy consumption and throughput metrics"
]

instance ActuateCraneAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated execution of optimal trajectories via Arduino-controlled motors"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneOperationMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical performance metrics including operational efficiency, fault patterns, and system health indicators"
]

instance CraneStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane position, velocity, load, and system telemetry with historical comparison"
]

instance ModelFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantified validation metrics comparing digital twin kinematic model with real-time sensor data"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected discrepancies between physical and virtual states indicating potential faults or drift"
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization of air quality parameters with spatial and temporal distribution"
]

instance AirQualityForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted air quality trends with upper and lower confidence bounds for decision support"
]

instance GreenhouseAdaptationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation patterns between physical greenhouse and its digital twin representation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **Control Application** receives trajectory commands from the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which leverages a kinematics model to produce optimal movement trajectories for the crane. These trajectories are designed to eliminate residual swinging motion at the end of execution. The **Control Application** uses the **Physical Crane Interface** to translate these trajectories into control signals for the **Physical Crane**. No explicit command formats, validation/authentication mechanisms, or feedback systems are detailed in the document. Conflict resolution or command execution confirmation processes are not mentioned, nor are specific control message structures (e.g., waypoints, velocity profiles) described."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system architectures are predominantly **ad-hoc**, avoiding commercial frameworks. **GreenhouseDT** integrates an **InfluxDB** time-series database, an **ActiveMQ** message broker, and virtual machines for behavioral adaptation of both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin. **Air Quality Management** leverages **AutomationML** for model-driven engineering, **Microsoft Azure** tools for pipeline implementation, and a Raspberry Pi with sensors for real-time data acquisition. The **lab-scale gantry crane** uses the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, an **Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT Broker** for message handling, and a **Python-based controller interface** for real-time state logging and validation. Resource management is implicit, with no centralized orchestration layer described; instead, each exemplar relies on lightweight, domain-specific components (e.g., virtual machines, single-board computers) and open-source tools for dissemination."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** implements a **continuous validation service** that compares **executed trajectories** (physical system) with **simulations** (digital twin) by calculating **distance metrics** between them. If the metric exceeds an **acceptable threshold**, operators are notified via a **dashboard**. No uncertainty quantification, error correction mechanisms, or quality assurance processes beyond this threshold-based alerting are documented. The **Air Quality Management** and **GreenhouseDT** exemplars do not specify fidelity or validity considerations in the provided text."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin system employs a **centralized architecture** with a **TimescaleDB** database as the core data repository, storing all system-generated data. Inter-service communication is facilitated by an **MQTT Broker**, which handles signaling between containers (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation). The network topology is not explicitly detailed, but the system is deployed on a single personal computer co-located with the physical crane. No specifications for bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) are provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin system is deployed **on-premise** on a personal computer, co-located with the **Physical Crane**. The **Database (TimescaleDB)**, **MQTT Broker**, and **Dashboard (Grafana)** are containerized using **Docker** for ease of deployment. The **Physical Crane Interface**, **Control Application**, **Logging Application**, and **Human Machine Interface** are implemented as standalone Python applications running on the same host. No cloud or edge deployment is mentioned. Scalability mechanisms, computational/storage requirements, or availability/reliability assurances are not specified beyond the containerized components."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems demonstrate **limited external integration**, primarily relying on internal or self-contained components. **GreenhouseDT** uses **InfluxDB** and **ActiveMQ** for internal data storage and messaging, with no explicit dependencies on external enterprise systems. **Air Quality Management** integrates **AutomationML** for model exchange and **Microsoft Azure** for cloud-based pipeline execution, but no broader enterprise interoperability is described. The **lab-scale gantry crane** operates on a **single personal computer** with a **Python interface** to controllers, relying solely on freely available software (e.g., Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT Broker) and **no industrial protocols (e.g., OPC UA)** or cloud services (e.g., Azure IoT Hub). All exemplars prioritize self-sufficiency, with external integration confined to domain-specific tools (e.g., AutomationML, Azure) or minimal sensor/actuator interfaces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adheres to:
  - **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling and interoperability.
  - **Microsoft Azure tools** for cloud-based pipeline implementation, implying compliance with Microsoft’s cloud standards (e.g., Azure IoT, Event Hubs).
  GreenhouseDT uses **InfluxDB** (a time-series database standard) and **ActiveMQ** (a JMS-compliant message broker), suggesting alignment with open-source interoperability standards. The gantry crane exemplar lacks explicit standardization details. **No industry-specific certifications or compliance frameworks** (e.g., ISO 27001, IEC 62443) are mentioned."
]
